name: agent-odin
description: Deployable service foundation for the GymX programme-planning intelligence service.

scripts.bundle:functions: esbuild api/health.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=supabase/functions/_bundles/health-handler.js && esbuild api/odin/generate-programme.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=supabase/functions/_bundles/generate-programme-handler.js && esbuild api/odin/generate-programme-v2.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=supabase/functions/_bundles/generate-programme-v2-handler.js && esbuild api/inbody/parse.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=supabase/functions/_bundles/inbody-parse-handler.js && esbuild api/odin/swap-options.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=supabase/functions/_bundles/swap-options-handler.js && esbuild api/odin/confirm-swap.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=supabase/functions/_bundles/confirm-swap-handler.js && esbuild api/odin/next-prescription.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=supabase/functions/_bundles/next-prescription-handler.js && esbuild api/odin/readiness-check.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=supabase/functions/_bundles/readiness-check-handler.js
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run bundle:functions && npx supabase functions deploy health generate-programme generate-programme-v2 inbody-parse swap-options confirm-swap next-prescription readiness-check
